page.title: Template:Birth and death year and age

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Birth_and_death_year_and_age here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
__NOTOC__{{Documentation subpage}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] == Usage == The templates {{tl|Birth year and age}} and {{tl|Death year and age}} return a person's year of birth or death and their approximate age. The templates are useful when only the year, or year and month, of a person's birth and/or death are known, or if it is desired not to state a person's full dates of birth and death for privacy reasons. Such an approximation differs from the approximation generated by {{tl|Birth based on age as of date}}; the latter can be used when the only detail available about someone's birth is a reference that establishes their age as of a certain date (such as the date that the reference was published). {| class="wikitable plainlinksneverexpand noprint" style="margin-top:0; width:100%; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" style="background:#dfd;"| The examples on this page use the current date as
{{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} |} The person's age is estimated as follows: === {{Birth year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}; and #that the present date is {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}. *If the person was born after {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}} then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years + 1 day}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old on {{#time:d F Y|now}} as they have not had their 55th birthday yet. On the other hand, if they were born exactly on or before {{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}, then they will be {{age|{{#time:d F Y|now - 55 years}}|{{#time:Y-m-d|now}}}} years old. *:Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} }} *:displays their birth year and age as: {{birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}} *Optionally, if we know the person's birth month but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. *:Let us assume that the person was born in June {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}. Therefore: *:*If it is presently January {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has not had their birthday yet. Therefore, the template {{tlx|Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|6}} displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54). *:*If it is presently June {{CURRENTYEAR}}, we do not know whether the person has had their birthday this year yet since their day of birth is unknown. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 54–55). *:*If it is presently December {{CURRENTYEAR}}, then this year the person has already had their birthday. Therefore, the template displays their birth year and age as: {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}} (age 55). === {{Death year and age}} === Let us assume: #that the person in question was born some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}; and #that they died some time in {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. *We can posit as two extremes: (1) that the person was born on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 49 years old at the time of their death as they did not achieve their 50th birthday on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}; and (2) that they were born on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} and died on 31 December {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}, in which case they would have been 50 years old at the time of their death as they had their 50th birthday on 1 January {{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}. ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}} }} ::renders their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}} *Optionally, if we know the month of the person's death but not the day, we can also have the template display the month. :Using the above examples and assuming the month is {{CURRENTMONTH}} ({{CURRENTMONTHNAME}}) ::Therefore, the template {{tlx|Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}} }} ::displays their death year and age as: {{death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}} If you wish to set out the full dates of birth and/or death of a person and thus to calculate their age accurately, please use the templates {{tl|Birth date and age}} and {{tl|Death date and age}}. == Syntax == {{Birth year and age|year of birth}} {{Birth year and age|year of birth|optional number of month of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth}} {{Death year and age|year of death|year of birth|optional number of month of death}} == Examples == {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} - 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Birth year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 55}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTMONTH}} + 1}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{Death year and age|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 1}}|{{#expr: {{CURRENTYEAR}} - 51}}|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}} [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
